$comment: Design token file for the Time Picker Android component
$description: Android-style time picker with two modes: Dial (analogue clock face with a draggable hand) and Input (text-field entry). Both modes share the same header row (hour field + colon + minute field + AM/PM switcher) and footer row (mode-toggle icon + Cancel/OK buttons). The Dial mode additionally renders a 280px circular clock face. Width is fixed at 280px. The Input Field and Content Switcher Mobile sub-components are from the same Figma file and have their own token files — only container-level and unique element tokens are captured here.

gap.description: 16px vertical gap between the header row, the clock face (Dial mode), and the footer row
16px horizontal gap between the inputs group (hour + colon + minute) and the AM/PM Content Switcher
8px horizontal gap between the hour input field, the colon separator, and the minute input field

typography.description: 18px Regular, 28px line-height — colon separator between hour and minute fields

clock.description: Analogue clock face rendered only in Dial mode

size.description: Equal width and height — fills the full component width

border-radius.description: Greater than half the size — renders as a perfect circle

background.description: #eaecf0 — light gray face of the clock dial

shadow.description: Two-layer drop shadow giving the clock face depth and lift

font-size.description: Font size for each hour number (12, 1 … 11) around the dial

line-height.description: Line height for hour number labels

letter-spacing.description: Tight letter spacing on the clock number labels

color.description: #1d2939 — dark text for unselected hour numbers around the dial

selection-bubble.description: Filled circle that highlights the currently selected hour on the dial

size.description: Width and height of the selection bubble

background.description: #004eeb — deep primary blue fill on the selected hour bubble

text-color.description: White numeral inside the selection bubble

font-size.description: Font size for the numeral inside the selection bubble

line-height.description: Line height for the numeral inside the selection bubble

size.description: Width and height of the pivot dot at the centre of the clock face

gap.description: Horizontal gap between the mode-toggle icon and the Cancel/OK button group

size.description: 36px — width and height of the mode-toggle icon button

dial-mode-icon.description: Icon shown in Dial mode — tapping it switches to Input (text-field) mode

input-mode-icon.description: Icon shown in Input mode — tapping it switches back to Dial mode

gap.description: 16px gap between Cancel and OK buttons

background.description: White background for the ghost Cancel button

color.description: #84adff — light primary blue outline on the Cancel button

text-color.description: #004eeb — primary blue label on the Cancel button

background.description: #155eef — filled primary blue background for the OK button

text-color.description: White label on the filled OK button
